## pvectl qm delete

Permanently delete a VM

```
pvectl qm delete [name-or-vmid] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help    help for delete
      --purge   also remove the VM from backup jobs, replication jobs, HA, and ACLs
  -y, --yes     skip the confirmation prompt
```

### Options inherited from parent commands

```
      --debug     log Proxmox API request/response activity to stderr
      --verbose   show Proxmox task IDs (UPIDs) alongside action output
```
